groups.title: Spawn (0-5 min)
items: Mine at least 100 iron ore and 100 coal by hand.
Craft and place first burner miner.
Build two self-feeding burner coal loops.
Mine enough stone to place 12+ furnaces.
Place 8-12 iron furnaces and 4-6 copper furnaces.
Place offshore pump, boilers, and steam engines for first power block.

groups.title: Red/Green Science (5-30 min)
items: Bring electric miners online for iron and copper.
Automate red and green science at 30-60 SPM.
Automate gears, circuits, belts, and inserters.
Research Steel Processing, Automation 2, Electronics, and Fluid Handling.
Add a second iron patch and perimeter radar coverage.

groups.title: Oil & Blue Science (30-120 min)
items: Claim an oil field and connect crude by pipe or rail.
Run 4-8 refineries with heavy/light cracking.
Automate plastic, sulfur, batteries, and engines.
Automate blue science and stabilize throughput.
Expand power before consumption peaks.

groups.title: Bot Transition (2-4h)
items: Build a roboport mall network.
Produce 100+ construction bots and 100+ logistic bots.
Switch mall logistics to provider/requester chests.
Keep belts for bulk raw materials and bots for complex builds.

groups.title: Purple/Yellow Science (4-6h)
items: Automate rails, electric furnaces, and productivity modules.
Bring purple science online.
Automate LDS, blue circuits, and flying robot frames.
Bring yellow science online.
Create dedicated blocks for green/red/blue circuits and LDS.

groups.title: Rocket & Departure
items: Build rocket silo and automate RCUs, rocket fuel, and LDS surplus.
Build first orbital platform loop (thrusters, cargo, fuel, ammo).
Leave Nauvis only after sustainable launches and >30% power margin.

groups.title: Arrival & Bootstrap
items: Secure landing zone, power, and defenses.
Scout lava and ore; start iron/copper/tungsten lines.
Unlock and mass-produce foundries quickly.

groups.title: Scale & Export
items: Replace legacy smelting with foundries.
Automate foundry exports to Nauvis.
Scale steel and tungsten exports.

groups.title: Arrival & Recycling
items: Set up lightning-safe power immediately.
Bootstrap recycler chain and continuous scrap intake.

groups.title: Electronics Scale
items: Automate electromagnetic plants.
Scale recycler loops for circuit amplification.
Export blue circuits, batteries, and advanced electronics.

groups.title: Arrival & Bioflux
items: Secure farm zones and start bioflux.
Implement spoilage handling from the first production lines.

groups.title: Throughput
items: Scale nutrient throughput and biochambers.
Automate agriculture with decay-aware logistics.
Prioritize flow over long-term storage buffers.

groups.title: Arrival
items: Stabilize heat and secure fuel chain immediately.
Build insulated logistics for critical routes.

groups.title: Endgame Scale
items: Add redundant heat infrastructure.
Ensure reliable imports and large fuel reserves.
Scale endgame science production safely.

groups.title: Early Platform
items: Install thrusters, fuel tanks, cargo bays, ammo, and grabbers.
Start asteroid processing and basic platform production.

groups.title: Mid/Endgame
items: Automate ammo and repairs with redundant power.
Enable multi-item logistics and science transport.
Achieve self-sustaining fuel and autonomous defense.

groups.title: Always Prioritize
items: Keep labs researching continuously.
Expand power, mining, and smelting before shortages.
Double iron/copper output before bottlenecks hit.

groups.title: Failure Mode Checks
items: Audit power headroom every major expansion.
Start steel early and scale continuously.
Fix oil throughput before adding more science.
Transition to bots before base complexity spikes.
Buffer rocket intermediates to prevent launch stalls.
